location.name: The Ruins
location.setup: Before Setup Phase, place Ruin Tiles as shown in illustration below.
location.alternative_victory_condition: Alternative Victory Condition: If a player occupies all Ruins simultaneously with his own Creatures, he wins the game at the end of his turn. Creatures that occupy Ruins will be put immediately into Reserve.
special_rules: Power Level 1 creatures on Ruins go to Reserve immediately.
